title: 15] To consider the nominations of: Lieutenant...
description: Full Committee Hearing on January 15, 2026 at 4:30 AM
text:
Full Committee Hearing
To consider the nominations of: Lieutenant General Francis L. Donovan, USMC to be general and Commander, United States Southern Command; and Lieutenant General Joshua M. Rudd, USA to be general and Director, National Security Agency/Chief, Central Security Service/Commander, United States Cyber Command
